title: Browse the story catalogue and open a story in the reader
description: Verifies a visitor can discover stories from the catalogue and enter the immersive reader from a story card.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for story cards to load
Click a story card
Verify the immersive story reader is displayed with chapter navigation available

title: Complete landing-to-reader discovery journey
description: Verifies a visitor can go from the landing page to the story catalogue and open a story in the immersive reader with chapters visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call-to-action to browse stories
Click a story card from the story catalogue
Verify the immersive story reader is displayed
Verify a chapter list or chapter navigation control is displayed

title: Primary hero CTA routes to the story catalogue
description: Verifies the primary landing page call-to-action takes the user to the Story Catalogue page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero section to finish initial rendering
Click the primary hero call-to-action to browse stories
Verify the story catalogue page is displayed

title: Navigate through primary site pages from the global navbar
description: Verifies a visitor can use global navigation to reach core pages and return home without dead ends.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Stories navigation link
Click the Archive navigation link
Click the Protocol navigation link
Click the brand link
Verify the landing page hero section is displayed

title: Hero section loads and scroll progress responds
description: Verifies the landing hero renders without blocking errors and the scroll progress indicator updates when the user scrolls.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero section to finish initial rendering
Scroll down
Scroll down further
Verify the scroll progress indicator reflects the new scroll position

title: Navigate between chapters while reading
description: Verifies a reader can switch chapters from the chapter navigation and see the reader update to the newly selected chapter content.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card from the story catalogue
Scroll through the chapter content
Use the chapter list or sidebar to select a different chapter
Verify the chapter content updates to the newly selected chapter
Verify the chapter navigation reflects the newly selected chapter

title: CTA takes user to the story catalogue
description: Verifies that activating the primary CTA on the landing page navigates the user to the story catalogue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the CTA section comes into view
Activate the primary CTA action
Verify the user lands on the story catalogue page

title: Send a message and receive a streaming WiseEpu response
description: Verifies a visitor can submit a prompt and see the assistant stream a response in the chat panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating chat trigger button
Fill "suggest a published story" into the chat input
Submit the chat message
Wait for the assistant response to start streaming
Verify an assistant response message is displayed in the chat thread

title: Theme toggle applies across routes and persists on refresh
description: Verifies a visitor can toggle the theme, see it apply across pages, and have it persist after a refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle dark/light theme
Click the Stories navigation link
Wait for the story catalogue grid to load
Refresh the page
Verify the selected theme is still applied after refresh

title: TTS narration can play and pause in the reader
description: Verifies a reader can start TTS narration and then pause it using the reader controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card from the story catalogue
Start TTS narration from the reader controls
Wait for the narration playback state to change
Pause TTS narration from the reader controls
Verify the narration is in a paused state

title: Open and close the WiseEpu chat panel from the floating trigger
description: Verifies a visitor can open the AI assistant panel and dismiss it without leaving the current page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating chat trigger button
Click the chat panel close control
Verify the chat panel is not visible

title: Marquee renders published story titles
description: Verifies the landing marquee loads and displays a scrolling set of published story titles.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the story ticker / marquee section
Wait for the marquee content to render
Verify a list of story titles is displayed in the marquee

title: Use catalogue filtering or browsing controls to change visible stories
description: Verifies a visitor can use the listing controls to narrow or change the set/order of story cards shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for story cards to load
Use the catalogue filter or sort control to change the listing
Verify the visible set or order of story cards changes

title: Chapter illustrations update when switching chapters
description: Verifies that changing chapters updates the illustration area alongside the text.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card from the story catalogue
Observe the chapter illustration area
Use the chapter list or sidebar to select a different chapter
Verify the illustration area updates for the newly selected chapter

title: Browse archive listings
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate to the archive page and view archived story listings for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the archive
Verify archived story listings are displayed

title: Reader supports keyboard-only chapter navigation
description: Verifies a keyboard-only user can focus chapter navigation controls and change chapters without using a mouse.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card from the story catalogue
Press Tab repeatedly to move focus into the chapter navigation area
Press Enter on a non-active chapter option
Verify the chapter content updates to the selected chapter

title: Secondary hero CTA opens the platform explanation area
description: Verifies the secondary hero call-to-action reveals platform information content on the landing experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero section to finish initial rendering
Click the secondary hero call-to-action to explore the platform
Verify platform explanation content is displayed

title: Chat input prevents submitting an empty message
description: Verifies the chat UI blocks or ignores empty submissions so no new user message is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating chat trigger button
Submit the chat message with the input empty
Verify no new user message appears in the chat thread

title: Manifesto shows loading skeleton then renders content
description: Verifies the manifesto section shows a skeleton while loading and then renders mission content when loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the manifesto section
Wait for the manifesto fetch/render cycle to complete
Verify the manifesto section displays rich text content or a fallback quote

title: CTA section renders when reached
description: Verifies that the full-bleed CTA section is visible when scrolled into view and presents an actionable primary CTA.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the CTA section comes into view
Verify the CTA section and its primary action are displayed

title: Sign In navigation opens the login page
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the sign-in page from global navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign-in navigation link
Verify the sign-in page is displayed

title: Bento grid reveals on scroll
description: Verifies that the bento grid becomes visible when the user scrolls down the landing page and remains usable after the reveal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the bento grid section comes into view
Verify the bento grid cards are displayed

title: Navigate to data terms from site chrome
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the data terms page via global navigation or footer and view the policy content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the link to view data terms
Verify the data terms content is displayed

title: Marquee hover highlights a story title
description: Verifies hovering a story title in the marquee produces a visible focus/highlight change for that item.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the story ticker / marquee section
Wait for the marquee content to render
Move pointer over a story title in the marquee
Verify the hovered story title shows a visible highlight or focus state

title: Capabilities section animates into view on scroll
description: Verifies that the capabilities section appears when scrolled into view and its visual elements render without blocking the content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the capabilities section comes into view
Verify the capabilities section content is displayed

title: Navigate to system status from site chrome
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the system status page via global navigation or footer and view the status dashboard content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the link to view system status
Verify the system status dashboard content is displayed

title: Story catalogue remains usable when a story card lacks a cover image
description: Verifies story cards render without breaking layout or interaction when a cover image is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for story cards to load
Scroll through the story grid to locate a card that displays a cover placeholder or missing image state (if present)
Click that story card
Verify the immersive story reader opens successfully

title: Bento grid provides hover interaction feedback
description: Verifies that hovering a bento card shows interaction feedback and the grid remains stable and readable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the bento grid section comes into view
Move the pointer over a bento grid card
Verify the hovered bento card shows hover feedback

title: Capabilities cells provide hover interaction feedback
description: Verifies that hovering a capability cell shows interaction feedback while keeping the capability content accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the capabilities section comes into view
Move the pointer over a capability cell
Verify the hovered capability cell shows hover feedback
